title: Canada Vows to Cut Economic Dependence on U.S. Partners
meta_description: Canadian PM Mark Carney declares over-reliance on U.S. trade a national vulnerability, pledging bold diversification moves to secure Canada's economic future.
excerpt: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney has issued a stark warning that his country's deep economic entanglement with the United States represents a structural vulnerability that must be urgently corrected. In a nationally broadcast video address, Carney outlined his government's intention to diversify trade relationships and reduce dependence on a single foreign partner. The declaration marks one of the most direct acknowledgments by a sitting Canadian leader that the U.S.-Canada economic relationship, long considered a cornerstone of North American prosperity, has become a liability.
